siftstack.selftest_tail:
PASS gate 1: Determinism: generate(7, L, 6, mode) twice -> identical JSON, all levels/modes.
PASS gate 2: Seed disjointness: seeds 7 vs 8 share no item content.
PASS gate 3: Oracle perfection: oracle_policy scores 1.0 on every item (all levels, both modes).
PASS gate 4: Random floor: mean random_policy score <= 0.05 (or <= 0.15 with justification in README for ratio-scored families).
PASS gate 5: Degenerate resistance: empty-string policy, constant most-plausible-answer policy, and echo-the-observation policy each score <= 0.1 mean.
PASS gate 6: Monotone difficulty: noisy-oracle (eps=0.5: each turn, 50% oracle action / 50% random) mean score is non-increasing L1->L4 (tolerance 0.05).
PASS gate 7: Budgets: prompt/observation char limits, max_turns caps, generation+scoring < 50 ms/item.
PASS gate 8: Purity: module imports nothing beyond the stdlib.
PASS gate 9: Bare-answer fallback: bare-answer-oracle scores 1.0; echo/constant/empty stay <= 0.1.
